creator: fritz.heinrichmeyer@fernuni-hagen.de
text:
Xfree86-4 installed as one port installs libfreetype.so.6 which is in the
way after the freetype2 port is installed. This does not happen if i install Xfree86-4 in "pieces"

Fix: 

don't install XFree86-4 but Xfree86-4-libraries, --clients and --Server
How-To-Repeat: install XFree86-4, then the freetype2 port
